properties.description: Ordered list of cdi:InstanceVariables (inline cdifInstanceVariable or @id-reference to one declared elsewhere in the dataset). Position is implicit in array order.
reference to an instance variable defined for this dataset
Essentially the same as schema:propertyID. References to concepts that this variable measures or represents.

Specifies the role this variable plays in a data structure. UnitIdentifier names the unit a row describes; Measure holds observed/derived values; Attribute qualifies an observation; Dimension addresses a cell in a multi-dimensional cube; Descriptor names the variable that a Reference column records values for (long format); ReferenceVariable holds those recorded values.
identifier or name for the data type concept.
Related concepts in other schemes.
Narrower concepts in other schemes.
Broader concepts in other schemes.
Concepts in other schemes with similar meaning.
Concepts in other schemes with equivalent meaning.
Associatively related concepts.
Narrower (child) concepts in the hierarchy. Items are inline concept objects or @id references.
Broader (parent) concepts in the hierarchy. Items are inline concept objects or @id references.
Concept scheme(s) for which this is a top concept.
Concept scheme(s) this concept belongs to.
Example of use of this concept.
Note for editors and maintainers.
Note documenting a change.
Note about past state or use.
General note about this concept.
Note clarifying meaning and/or intended use.
Formal explanation of the meaning of this concept.
Classification code for this concept within a scheme.
Labels accessible to free-text search but not displayed.
Alternative lexical labels (acronyms, abbreviations, variants).
Preferred lexical label for this concept. A single string, a single language-tagged value, or an array of language-tagged values. Each language should appear at most once.
maximum numeric value in the dataset
minimum numeric value in the dataset
URI or code identifying the unit of measure
unit of measurement as text
identifier or name for the property concept
Text description or URI specifying how values for the variable were obtained.
text label for the term that is useful to human user
web-resolveable string for the identifier; host name part is location of a resolver that will return some representation for the given identifier value. E.g. https://doi.org/10.5066/F7VX0DMQ
the identifier string. E.g. 10.5066/F7VX0DMQ
In this context for the schema:PropertyValue, this field is an identifier for the identifier schema, e.g. DOI, ARK.  Get values from https://registry.identifiers.org/registry/ for interoperability
Name for the controlled vocabulary responsible for this keyword.
A representative code for this keyword in the controlled vocabulary. Analogous to skos:Notation
string label associated with the variable in the dataset serialization
